scripts.build: npm run build -w @spotify-wallpaper/shared-types && npm run build -w @spotify-wallpaper/configurator && npm run build -w @spotify-wallpaper/wallpaper
scripts.check: npm run check -w @spotify-wallpaper/shared-types && npm run check -w @spotify-wallpaper/configurator && npm run check -w @spotify-wallpaper/wallpaper
